creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Comment on attachment 174484 vuln.xml fragment MFSA 2016-62 > Unless you want to keep this specific to MFSA 2016-62 use same VID as in ports r419401. > Mozilla -- Memory Safety Hazards > > > firefox > 48.0 > www/firefox has PORTEPOCH. Why not just copy section from previous VuXML entry then increment numbers? > > thunderbird > linux-thunderbird > 45.3.0 > Did you forget www/libxul? >
>

MFSA2016-62 Miscellaneous memory safety hazards (rv:48.0 / rv:45.3)

For whatever you cite make sure to include a proper quote, not just its heading. Notice, most Mozilla multi-entries cite a parent page while you're citing a specific advisory.
